title: Finance Briefing: US stock futures advance as Iran peace hopes dent oil prices
summary: Leo Stone maps the latest market headlines to liquidity, rates, earnings expectations, and risk appetite.

body.text: The useful way to read market news is to connect each headline to a mechanism: cash flows, liquidity, policy expectations, positioning, or risk appetite.

items: US stock futures advance as Iran peace hopes dent oil prices
Analysis-SpaceX debut draws a crowd, but few recent hot IPOs outpace the market
Oil prices mixed as U.S. military strikes against Iran cloud Middle East peace prospects
Samsung’s non-chip union files injunction in bid to stop vote on bonuses, media reports
South Korea's Kospi hits fresh record as hopes of U.S.-Iran breakthrough rise

body.text: The first-order story is rarely enough. A professional reading asks whether the news changes the discount rate, the earnings path, the cost of capital, or the market's willingness to pay for uncertainty.

body.caption: A quiet systems illustration for this briefing.

body.text: This article is informational analysis, not investment advice. The goal is to make the signal clearer and the assumptions more explicit.
